title: ChatWorking
description:
This mod adds the ability to disable chat in your world!
Op players can disable chat for all other players in the dimension. If you want to disable the ability to write, then simply write /chatwork disable|enable
body:
This lightweight mod adds the ability to disable chat in your world!
Operator players can disable chat for all other players in the dimension. If you want to disable the ability to write, then simply write:
```
/ chat work @players disable|enable
```
